parameters.formDescription: Upload an Excel (.xlsx) RFP file with embedded product images. Images will be analyzed using AI Vision to match products from our database.

parameters.jsCode:
// Extract results from API response and split into individual items
const response = $input.first().json;
const results = response.results || [];
const clientName = $('Prepare Image RFP Data').first().json.client_name || 'Client';
const summary = response.summary || {};
const meta = response.meta || {};

const items = results.map(r => ({
  json: {
    rfp_line: r.rfp_line,
    query: r.query,
    description: r.description || '',
    image_description: r.image_description || '',
    match_source: r.match_source || 'text',
    quantity: r.quantity,
    location: r.location || '',
    notes: r.notes || '',
    matched: r.matched,
    confidence: r.confidence,
    matched_on: r.matchedOn || '',
    product_name: r.product ? r.product.name : 'No match found',
    brand: r.product ? r.product.brand : '',
    product_description: r.product ? (r.product.description || '') : '',
    dimensions: r.product ? (r.product.dimensions || '') : '',
    materials: r.product ? (r.product.materials || '') : '',
    designer: r.product ? (r.product.designer || '') : '',
    category: r.product ? (r.product.category || '') : '',
    weight: r.product ? (r.product.weight || '') : '',
    pdf_url: r.product ? (r.product.pdf_url || '') : '',
    image_url: r.product ? (r.product.image_url || '') : '',
    rfp_image_url: r.rfp_image_url || '',
    source_url: r.product ? (r.product.source_url || '') : '',
    variants_count: r.product ? (r.product.variants || []).length : 0,
    alternatives: r.alternatives || [],
    client_name: clientName,
    total_items: summary.total || results.length,
    total_matched: summary.matched || 0,
    total_review: summary.needsReview || 0,
    images_extracted: meta.imagesExtracted || 0,
    matched_by_image: summary.matchedByImage || 0,
    matched_by_text: summary.matchedByText || 0
  }
}));

return items;

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: '1693047697', text: $json.message, parse_mode: 'HTML', disable_web_page_preview: true }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'gpt-4o', temperature: 0.3, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are an RFP response assistant for a furniture company. Given a product match from our database, write a short professional slide description. Return ONLY valid JSON with no markdown formatting.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'RFP Requirement: ' + $json.query + '
Quantity needed: ' + $json.quantity + '
Location: ' + ($json.location || 'N/A') + '
Notes: ' + ($json.notes || 'N/A') + '
Image Analysis: ' + ($json.image_description || 'N/A') + '
Match Source: ' + $json.match_source + '

Matched Product: ' + $json.product_name + ' by ' + $json.brand + '
Match Confidence: ' + ($json.confidence * 100).toFixed(1) + '%
Description: ' + $json.product_description + '
Dimensions: ' + $json.dimensions + '
Materials: ' + $json.materials + '
Designer: ' + $json.designer + '

Write:
1. A slide title (short, 5-8 words)
2. A 2-3 sentence product recommendation paragraph
3. Key specs as bullet points

Return as JSON: {"slide_title": "...", "recommendation": "...", "specs": ["...", "..."]}' }] }) }}

parameters.name: ={{ $('Prepare Image RFP Data').first().json.client_name + ' - RFP Image Match.pptx' }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: '1693047697', text: $json.message, parse_mode: 'HTML', disable_web_page_preview: true }) }}
